single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)"|search PCI | stats count | rangemap field="count" severe=0-0 low=1-999999 default=severe
single.title: Vulnerabiliy Scan

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)" | search PCI | rex field=_raw "[a-z]*,[0-9]*,[0-9.]*,(?<CVSS>[^,]+)" | stats avg(CVSS) | rangemap field=avg(CVSS) low=0-1 elevated=2-2 severe=3-5 default=low
single.title: Average CVSS Score

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)" | search PCI | rex field=_raw "[a-z]*,[0-9]*,[0-9.]*,(?<CVSS>[^,]+)" | sort -CVSS limit=1 | stats avg(CVSS) | rangemap field=avg(CVSS) low=0-1 elevated=2-2 severe=3-5 default=low
single.title: Highest CVSS Score

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)"|search web | stats count | rangemap field="count" severe=0-0 low=1-999999 default=severe
single.title: Vulnerabiliy Scan

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)" | search web | rex field=_raw "[a-z]*,[0-9]*,[0-9.]*,(?<CVSS>[^,]+)" | stats avg(CVSS) | rangemap field=avg(CVSS) low=0-1 elevated=2-2 severe=3-5 default=low
single.title: Average CVSS Score

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)" | search web | rex field=_raw "[a-z]*,[0-9]*,[0-9.]*,(?<CVSS>[^,]+)" | sort -CVSS limit=1 | stats avg(CVSS) | rangemap field=avg(CVSS) low=0-1 elevated=2-2 severe=3-5 default=low
single.title: Highest CVSS Score

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)"|search PCIDB | stats count | rangemap field="count" severe=0-0 low=1-999999 default=severe
single.title: Vulnerabiliy Scan

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)" | search PCIDB | rex field=_raw "[a-z]*,[0-9]*,[0-9.]*,(?<CVSS>[^,]+)" | stats avg(CVSS) | rangemap field=avg(CVSS) low=0-1 elevated=2-2 severe=3-5 default=low
single.title: Average CVSS Score

single.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/*" | rex field=_raw "(?<NETWORK>[^,]+)" | search PCIDB | rex field=_raw "[a-z]*,[0-9]*,[0-9.]*,(?<CVSS>[^,]+)" | sort -CVSS limit=1 | stats avg(CVSS) | rangemap field=avg(CVSS) low=0-1 elevated=2-2 severe=3-5 default=low
single.title: Highest CVSS Score

chart.searchString: source="/var/log/rapid7/vascanner.log" | rex field=_raw "Score: (?<SCORE>[0-9]\.[0-9])" | rex field=_raw "CVSS: (?<CVSS>[0-9]\s)" | timechart max(CVSS),max(SCORE) | fillnull value=0 | rename max(SCORE) as "CVSS Score of VA",max(CVSS) as "CVSS Best Practise"
chart.title: CVSS Vulnerability Charting
